revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:1980 in Japan]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:1980 in Japan]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

[[Category:1…'

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1980年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1980]] [[azb:Category:۱۹۸۰-جی ایلده ژاپون]] [[commons:Category:1980 in Japan]] [[eo:Category:1980 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1980]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۸۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1980 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1980 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1980]] [[ko:Category:1980년 일본]] [[no:Category:1980 i Japan]] [[pl:Category:1980 w Japonii]] [[pt:Category:1980 no Japão]] [[ro:Category:1980 în Japonia]] [[ru:Category:1980 год в Японии]] [[sv:Category:1980 i Japan]] [[tr:Category:1980'de Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1980 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1980ء]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1980]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1980 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1980年日本]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Built_in_Japan_in_1980]].

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
link to Commons is now defined on wikidata

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1980_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
